basic_details.job_title: NEIGRIHMS Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 52 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: North Eastern Indira Gandhi Regional Institute of Health & Medical Sciences (NEIGRIHMS)
basic_details.short_information: North Eastern Indira Gandhi Regional Institute of Health & Medical Sciences (NEIGRIHMS) has published the Faculty Posts (Professor/ Associate Professor/ Assistant Professor) Notification 2026 on 08-05-2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 52 Faculty Posts positions. Candidates holding qualifications such as MBBS, MD/MS/DM/MCh or equivalent with required teaching/research experience and Medical Council Registration are eligible to apply through offline mode at NEIGRIHMS Official Website. The application process is active up to 03-08-2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF

age_limit.age_details: As per Govt. of India rules for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwBD/Ex-SM
age_limit.details: All Posts: As per Govt. of India rules for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwBD/Ex-SM.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS or equivalent as per IMC Act 1956, MD/MS/DM/MCh or equivalent as per speciality, Teaching/research experience as specified per post, Registration with Central/State Medical Council

selection_process: Screening of applications Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NEIGRIHMS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://neigrihms.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NEIGRIHMS Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NEIGRIHMS Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NEIGRIHMS Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Screening of applications Interview Document Verification

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NEIGRIHMS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: http://neigrihms.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NEIGRIHMS Faculty Posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the NEIGRIHMS Faculty Posts is 22nd June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Faculty Posts at NEIGRIHMS?
faq.answer: There are a total of 52 vacancies for Faculty Posts, including Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor positions, as per the NEIGRIHMS recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for NEIGRIHMS Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for the NEIGRIHMS Faculty Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification required for the Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for Assistant Professor posts generally includes MBBS with MD/MS/DM/MCh (depending on the specialty) and a specified number of years of teaching/research experience, along with Medical Council Registration.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Faculty Posts at NEIGRIHMS?
faq.answer: The salary for the Faculty Posts ranges from Rs. 101500/- to Rs. 159100/- per month, depending on the post level, along with applicable allowances like NPA.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for NEIGRIHMS Faculty Recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 500/- for General/OBC candidates and Rs. 250/- for SC/ST candidates. Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) are exempted from paying any fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for NEIGRIHMS Faculty Posts?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves screening of applications, followed by an interview and document verification. Candidates must meet all eligibility criteria to be considered.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the official notification for NEIGRIHMS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification can be downloaded from the official website of NEIGRIHMS, which is http://neigrihms.gov.in. It is also available in the 'Important Links' section of this article.

faq.question: Q9. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for these posts is as per the Government of India rules for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwBD/Ex-SM categories. Specific age limits are not detailed in the summary but are subject to government norms.

faq.question: Q10. Does NEIGRIHMS offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for candidates belonging to SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwBD/Ex-SM categories as per the prevailing Government of India rules and regulations.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for NEIGRIHMS Faculty Posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the NEIGRIHMS Faculty Posts is 22nd June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.
